title: agrostophyllum spinuliferum subsp. spinuliferum
intro: Agrostophyllum spinuliferum subsp. spinuliferum, also known as the spiny Agrostophyllum, is a species of orchid native to Papua New Guinea. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, with its extracts showing potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Agrostophyllum spinuliferum subsp. spinuliferum include its ability to aid in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions due to its antimicrobial properties, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
